_contract: Executor may change ONLY 'passes' and 'evidence'. Flipping passes to true requires evidence (test name or file:line) in the same edit. Removing, rewording, reordering, or adding criteria is tampering: Verifier FAIL regardless of code quality. Criteria change only in planning, with the human.

criteria.text: Secrets pattern gitignored from commit zero
criteria.evidence: .gitignore:2-5 (.env, .env.*, *.secret, **/secrets.dart) present in root commit ce12908

criteria.text: dart run tool/build_db.dart exits 0 and writes assets/bible.db
criteria.evidence: verification-shots/M1/pipeline.txt — exit 0, wrote assets/bible.db (16MB)

criteria.text: DB contains 66 books and >= 31000 BSB verses (captured query output)
criteria.evidence: verification-shots/M1/db-query.txt — SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books = 66, FROM verses = 31086; test/tool/build_db_acceptance_test.dart M1-02

criteria.text: John 3:16 query returns BSB text containing 'only begotten' or 'one and only'
criteria.evidence: verification-shots/M1/db-query.txt — John 3:16 text contains 'one and only'; test/tool/build_db_acceptance_test.dart M1-03

criteria.text: Every verse maps to exactly one passage; Isaiah 53:5 passage spans within Isa 52:13-53:12 with a heading
criteria.evidence: verification-shots/M1/pipeline.txt — Isaiah 53:5 passage 'The Suffering Servant' spans Isaiah 53:1-53:8, within 52:13-53:12; test/tool/build_db_acceptance_test.dart M1-04 (also asserts every verse's passage_id resolves)

criteria.text: Top-weighted edge from the Isaiah 53 passage points to a New Testament passage
criteria.evidence: verification-shots/M1/pipeline.txt — top edge -> 1 Peter 2:21-2:25 'Christ's Example of Suffering', weight 714; test/tool/build_db_acceptance_test.dart M1-05

criteria.text: No orphan edges (asserted by test)
criteria.evidence: test/tool/build_db_acceptance_test.dart M1-06; also enforced at write time by tool/src/sqlite_writer.dart's _validate() (foreign-key existence check before the temp db is swapped in)

criteria.text: Isaiah 53 reachable in <=3 taps from launch; heading + full text shown (screenshot)
criteria.evidence: verification-shots/M2/M2-01-isaiah-53.png (captured via integration_test/app_test.dart on Chrome — Home->Isaiah->53, 2 taps, shows 'The Suffering Servant' heading + full 8-verse text)

criteria.text: Prev/next moves exactly one passage incl. Genesis-start and Malachi-end boundaries (test + screenshots)
criteria.evidence: integration_test/app_test.dart + test/ui/reader_navigation_test.dart (both passing); verification-shots/M2/M2-02-genesis-start.png (Previous disabled) and M2-02-malachi-to-matthew.png (Next from Malachi's last passage lands exactly on Matthew's first, no skip/repeat)

criteria.text: Airplane-mode Android launch renders a passage normally (screenshot)
criteria.evidence: verification-shots/M2/M2-03-airplane-mode.png — Android emulator, airplane_mode_on=1 + wifi/data disabled (confirmed via failed adb shell ping and the status-bar airplane icon), app force-stopped and relaunched, Isaiah 53 passage renders fully

criteria.text: Web build renders the same passage in a browser (screenshot)
criteria.evidence: verification-shots/M2/M2-01-isaiah-53.png — same capture as M2-01, taken via a real Chrome browser (flutter drive -d chrome)

criteria.text: Isaiah 53 constellation shows >=5 neighbours incl. at least one Gospel passage (screenshot)
criteria.evidence: verification-shots/M3/M3-01-isaiah-53-constellation.png (12 neighbours incl. Matthew 8, Matthew 20, John 1, John 12); data-asserted in integration_test/constellation_test.dart (neighbourEdges.length >= 5, book in 40..43)

criteria.text: Layout deterministic: identical screenshots across two runs (golden test)
criteria.evidence: test/ui/constellation_golden_test.dart — renders the widget twice from identical input, asserts pixel-identical PNG bytes; test/domain/constellation_test.dart asserts the underlying layout function's determinism

criteria.text: Tapping a neighbour recenters graph AND updates reader pane (test + before/after screenshots)
criteria.evidence: test/ui/constellation_recenter_test.dart (widget test, asserts reader pane text change + a second tap at the same coordinate lands on a different passage, proving the graph itself recentered); verification-shots/M3/M3-01-isaiah-53-constellation.png (before) and M3-03-after-recenter.png (after, centered on 1 Peter 2)

criteria.text: No dead taps across the 50 highest-degree passages (test)
criteria.evidence: test/ui/constellation_no_dead_taps_test.dart — sweeps all neighbours of the 50 highest-degree passages against the real built assets/bible.db, asserts every one resolves to a passage with a heading and verse text

criteria.text: Tap targets >=44dp; labels legible at default font scale (screenshot judged)
criteria.evidence: verification-shots/M3/M3-05-tap-targets-and-labels.png; lib/ui/constellation_view.dart kNodeRadius=26 (52dp diameter, exceeds the 44dp floor), kCenterNodeRadius=34 (68dp)
